description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test 'pip' Package that runs on every push to dev and main branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11) and pytest flags. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up Python, install ISOFIT and dependencies, cache and download additional data (6S, sRTMnet, Hypertrace), and execute tests with pytest.
